commands.repair_reason: No automated repair remains; maintainer review should decide whether the pending CI and missing live macOS launchd smoke are acceptable before landing.; Cleared: The diff changes existing gateway restart, update, launchd plist, tests, and changelog surfaces without adding dependencies, workflow permissions, secrets handling, or new artifact download/execute paths. (sha=1cd4ef59aab48ddf96ca44a5a361974832717b1d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR clears stale SIGUSR1 restart state on unauthorized signals, skips redundant package-update restarts after a healthy LaunchAgent refresh, sets LaunchAgent throttle and exit timeout values, widens HTTP bind retries, and adds focused tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can leave `emittedRestartToken > consumedRestartToken` after an unauthorized SIGUSR1, and the scheduler coalesces later restart requests while that token is unconsumed. I did not establish a live macOS launchd reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair remains; maintainer review should decide whether the pending CI and missing live macOS launchd smoke are acceptable before landing.

target.title: fix(gateway): harden macOS update restart lifecycle
